inputs.name: Microsoft 365 domain verification TXT value
inputs.instructions: In the Microsoft 365 admin center, go to Settings > Domains, select your domain, and copy the TXT value shown under 'Verify domain' (starts with MS=ms...).

inputs.name: DKIM selector1 CNAME target
inputs.instructions: In the Microsoft 365 admin center under DNS records, find the CNAME record for 'selector1._domainkey' and copy its target value.

inputs.name: DKIM selector2 CNAME target
inputs.instructions: Copy the target value for the 'selector2._domainkey' CNAME record.
